messages.content: Output the word hello exactly 160 times separated by a single space. Do not add any other text. /no_think

Output the word blue exactly 160 times separated by a single space. Do not add any other text. /no_think
Output the number 7 exactly 160 times separated by a single space. Do not add any other text. /no_think

Write red red red repeatedly until you have written red 160 times. Separate each word with one space and add nothing else. /no_think
Write no no no repeatedly until you have written no 160 times. Separate each word with one space and add nothing else. /no_think
Write up up up repeatedly until you have written up 160 times. Separate each word with one space and add nothing else. /no_think
Write on on on repeatedly until you have written on 160 times. Separate each word with one space and add nothing else. /no_think
